college_info.college_name: Nandadeep School of Optometry: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements

highlights.summary:
Nandadeep School of Optometry, formerly known as Prof. CR Patwardhan School of Optometry, has been affiliated with YCMOU since 2012. Nandadeep School Of Optometry is a private educational institute, situated in Sangli Maharashtra. The Nandadeep School of Optometry unit of Nandadeep Eye Hospital is affiliated with the prestigious Maharashtra University of Health Sciences (MUHS).

Nandadeep School of Optometry is attached to Nandadeep Eye Hospital, which is a group of super-speciality eye hospitals. With a great team of faculty, this college offers the best of facilities to its students in the field of Optometry. Nandadeep School of Optometry offers degree courses, internships, fellowships for Optometry, postgraduation for ophthalmologists, and many other courses to create the next generation of Optometrists in India. Admissions to all the courses are merit-based. Moreover, Nandadeep School of Optometry infuses high professional ethics, community orientation & camaraderie in their students apart from teaching them modern-day Optometry practice & research.

Some of the key highlights of Nandadeep School of Optometry are given below:

college_info.intro: Nandadeep School of Optometry offers many Courses across the Optometry stream. Nandadeep School of Optometry is known for its flagship BSc Optometry, Optometry Internship, Optometry Fellowship, and M Optometry Internship programmes. The course duration varies from 6 months to 4 years, depending on the course chosen by the candidate. Nandadeep School of Optometry offers courses such as Clinical Optometry Internship, Clinical Internship followed by Postgraduate fellowship (Comprehensive Clinical Optometry, Specialty Contact Lens & Anterior segment, Paediatric Optometry, Pediatric optometry, Binocular vision & Vision Therapy, Posterior Segment and Diagnostics), BSc Optometry under MUHS and many more.

placements.overview: Prof. CR Patwardhan School of Optometry opening promising opportunities and giving wings to an Optometry career. Also, Nandadeep School of Optometry affiliated with the State Government Medical University is the prestigious Maharashtra University of Health Science (MUHS), Nashik. Tertiary eye care hospital, 'Nandadeep Eye Hospital' with NABH accreditation, promises consistent and assured hands-on training on all the instruments and diagnostic tools under proper guidance with hundreds of patients observed every day. Institutes give Research opportunities and 100 percent placement. The career opportunities offered after these courses are in Corporate Sectors, Govt. Jobs, Private Practices, Entrepreneurships, Research Lab, NGOs, Optical Industries, Professional Services, Eye Care Hospitals, Educational Sectors and many more.

faqs.answer: A:    Nandadeep School of Optometry trained many students from all over India and is continuously maintaining a record of 100% job placements. Moreover, students have gone on to successful careers in its own Nandadeep Eye Hospital as well as individual optometry clinics, renowned hospitals across India, and optical companies. Many have also gone on to pursue higher studies at renowned institutes. Some of the career opportunities are:Private PracticeOptical IndustriesCorporate sectorGovt. JobEye
